# GoGPU — Pure Go GPU Computing Ecosystem

> Think Flutter or Qt, but Pure Go with zero CGO. Full stack from shader compilation to GUI widgets. 1.1M+ lines of code across 15 repositories.

## Getting Started

- [README](https://github.com/gogpu/gogpu/blob/main/README.md): Human-readable project overview, installation, features
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/gogpu/gogpu/blob/main/AGENTS.md): AI agent instructions — ecosystem map, quick start, search commands
- [SPONSORS.md](https://github.com/gogpu/gogpu/blob/main/SPONSORS.md): Project sponsors and how to support development

## Documentation

- [gogpu API](https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/gogpu/gogpu): App framework, windowing, input, lifecycle
- [gg API](https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/gogpu/gg): 2D graphics, text, paths, images
- [ui API](https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/gogpu/ui): GUI toolkit, 22+ widgets, Material 3 / Fluent / Cupertino
- [wgpu API](https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/gogpu/wgpu): WebGPU implementation (Vulkan/Metal/DX12/GLES/Software)
- [naga API](https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/gogpu/naga): Shader compiler (WGSL → SPIR-V/MSL/GLSL/HLSL/DXIL)
- [gpucontext API](https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/gogpu/gpucontext): Shared interfaces (DeviceProvider, EventSource)
- [gputypes API](https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/gogpu/gputypes): WebGPU type definitions

## Optional

- [g3d API](https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/gogpu/g3d): 3D rendering, scene graph, PBR materials
- [systray API](https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/gogpu/systray): System tray (Win32/macOS/Linux)
- [audio API](https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/gogpu/audio): Audio engine (WASAPI/CoreAudio/PulseAudio)
- [compose API](https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/gogpu/compose): Multi-process composition (Unix socket IPC)

## Examples

- [gogpu examples](https://github.com/gogpu/gogpu/tree/main/examples): Window, triangle, particles, HiDPI
- [gg examples](https://github.com/gogpu/gg/tree/main/examples): 2D drawing, GPU integration, gallery
- [ui examples](https://github.com/gogpu/ui/tree/main/examples): Hello, gallery, task manager

## Community

- [GitHub Organization](https://github.com/gogpu)
- [Discussions](https://github.com/gogpu/gogpu/discussions)
- [Open Collective](https://opencollective.com/gogpu)
